commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is indicated; this is an active maintainer-labeled PR touching live QA credentials and workflows, so the next step is maintainer review and merge gating.; Cleared: The diff touches secret-bearing workflows and archive-backed credentials, but the added jobs are gated, use existing maintainer/ref trust checks, and I found no concrete security or supply-chain regression. commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a WhatsApp QA Lab live lane, a WhatsApp QA driver export, Convex credential validation and operator guidance, CI/release workflow gating, package-boundary wiring, tests, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a bug report. The PR body provides after-fix live WhatsApp output, and current main has no WhatsApp QA lane to reproduce.
